title: Rohit Jain appointed as RBI deputy Governor
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Rohit Jain has been appointed.
*   He will serve as a Deputy Governor of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
*   This marks a new high-level leadership role within the central bank.

title: 9-year-old mountaineer from Siddipet scales Australia’s highest peak
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   A 9-year-old mountaineer, originating from Siddipet.
*   Successfully scaled Australia's highest peak.
*   The achievement highlights the young climber's remarkable feat.
